steps.title: Identify the dimensions
steps.content: The width is $w=5$ cm. The length is $30$ cm longer than the width, so $\ell = 5 + 30 = 35$ cm.

steps.title: Apply the perimeter/area formula
steps.content: Area of a rectangle is $A = \ell \cdot w$, so $A = 35 \cdot 5 = 175$ square cm. That matches choice A — A is correct.
